所有角色都很清晰，不是那种无脑文，还挺有悬疑气氛的。期待作者的后续情节。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764956501,"group_id":"7578794162498063422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3LQcb+wH2h9JPHPrRjWeJrybFj3VmJk/EqbGncp1As0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1981799686476419","user_name":"魔芋炒粉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1981799686476419","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《三十五岁获得系统，走向人生巅峰》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578794162498063422","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市爽文】+【多女主】+【现实】+【打脸日常】+【少量商战】
平行世界大夏国陈九安在三十五岁的时候，突然获得一个许愿系统，从此人生发生了巨大的变化。
辞掉牛马工作，开始搞钱生涯。秉持着穷则独善其身，达则兼济天下的理念。有钱了帮助国家，打击外国资本。
同时也收获了红颜知己。
任何敢在我面前嚣张的人，都要做好被我打脸的准备。如果不能打脸，那就是我愿望值不够了。
这些只是一部分，更多精彩内容尽在书中。本书前十章内就有惊喜。频率高密度大。
